{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231544328A845A0F221363D80894"}"},"total":12},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7360278889426371390","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"平平淡淡很温馨，偶尔常识上欠缺了点，但无伤大雅。（个人观点，不喜勿喷！点评并无恶意，只是标记👣，同效🔖🏷️，避免重刷。）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1713701028,"group_id":"7345504775456181272","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"    ✎ᨳᤢᤣ⍣࿐ᩚ 做人要像茶壶一样乐观，屁股都烧红了，还有心情——吹口哨！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+7GKo7o4gcblT1LKLxCnDo6NEXCA8yhxsbwHdKz9gmP","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a9a7f39021aa427792358b60e08018a0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788981&x-signature=%2FfwqaxKEvAw6GZPNPnTVFBAOFb0%3D","user_id":"3284954089797598","user_name":"ᨳᤢᤣ⍣冷夏ᴸ·ₓ"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3284954089797598","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1754598790,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7345504775456181272","book_info":{"abstract":"（穿越  十   种田  十  基建  十   美食  十  生存）
和闺蜜去海边露营看日出，一觉睡醒身在森林。
找到伙伴，一起扫山货，寻找食物，种田搞建筑。
没有战争，也没有爱恨情仇，就是很平淡的生存文。
已完结：《穿越农女，在桃花村发家致富》
穿越＋无有金手指＋有cp＋带着村民赚钱
亲眼听着医生宣布自己死亡，是一种什么样的体验？许玲的灵魂就飘在自己的尸体旁边，听着医生宣布着她的死亡时间，本以为要变成一个阿飘，却没想到转眼间到了一个架空的古代，变成了一个13岁带着弟弟独自生活的孤儿！小时候老听人家说只要不死100岁都有戏唱，却没想到只要灵魂不灭，就算你死了，也照样有戏唱……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of750a9be9a7d8cbca78c5ab592200b2b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"上进的小鱼仔","author_id":"","book_id":"7345504775456181272","book_name":"在远古，种田基建","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#90a878","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7345504782980743704","read_count":"99","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"138439"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"80","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,今穿古,基建","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2of750a9be9a7d8cbca78c5ab592200b2b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435872&x-signature=SKBYEam4UqaoMcCCqp66k0t2XWc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3073878368718376","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"152"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231544328A845A0F221363D80894"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":
